marketing.footerTagline: Built for students who deserve a safer path into their careers.
marketing.footerCopyright: © {year} Career Connect. Your privacy is never for sale.
marketing.heroTitle: A career journey where you don't have to explain yourself first.
marketing.heroDescription: Ask career questions anonymously, get mentor support, and practice with AI — all in one safe space built for you.
marketing.demoPostContent: Is it normal to feel behind when interviews here work so differently from back home?
marketing.featuresTitle: Everything you need, none of the pressure
marketing.featuresSubtitle: Built around trust, privacy, and accessibility from the first line of code.
marketing.featureCommunityDescription: Ask what you'd never post under your real name.
marketing.featureMentorDescription: Verified mentors reply, host AMAs, and share real stories.
marketing.featureAiDescription: Resume feedback, cover letters, and career advice, anytime.
marketing.featureMockInterviewDescription: Practice by text or voice and get scored feedback.
marketing.featureAccessibilityDescription: Dark mode, large text, high contrast, and multi-language.
marketing.featureMatchingDescription: Companies see your skills, not your identity — unless you choose to share it.
marketing.ctaTitle: You belong in this job market.
marketing.ctaDescription: Join a community that was built with you in mind, not as an edge case.
